page_title: Alcohol Rehab Dallas TX | Same-Day Admission | Tru Dallas Detox
page_description: Medical alcohol detox and residential rehab in Dallas. Most PPO plans accepted. Same-day admission available — call now for a free confidential assessment.
hero_paragraph: We accept most private PPO plans. Get a confidential 5-minute benefits check and find out if your alcohol treatment is 100% covered — private rooms available.
insurance_h2: Medical Alcohol Detox & Residential Rehab
insurance_body_p1: Alcohol withdrawal can be life-threatening without proper medical supervision. Our inpatient program provides 24/7 clinical monitoring and immediate placement — no waitlists.
insurance_body_p2: From acute alcohol detox through full residential care, every level of treatment is under one roof.
insurance_h2_2: Your PPO Plan Covers Alcohol Treatment
insurance_body_2: Most PPO plans cover the full cost of alcohol detox and residential rehab. We verify your benefits in minutes and make sure you're using every dollar your plan allows — so you can focus on one thing.
process_quote: "The fear of withdrawal keeps more people sick than withdrawal itself ever could. We built our alcohol detox protocol specifically to change that."
break_h2: One Call. We Take It From There.
break_body: From verifying your insurance to coordinating your admission and medical intake — our team has done this thousands of times. You make the decision to get help. We handle everything else.
treatment_h2: Full-Spectrum Alcohol Treatment — From Detox to Long-Term Recovery
treatment_card1_body: Our medically supervised alcohol detox provides 24/7 clinical monitoring, FDA-approved medications for alcohol withdrawal, and individualized care — so your body can stabilize safely.
treatment_card2_body: Residential alcohol treatment at Tru Dallas means structure, clinical depth, and real peer connection. Individual therapy, group sessions, and psychiatric support — all under one roof, from day one.
treatment_card3_body: Recovery from alcohol doesn't end at discharge. Our alumni program keeps you connected to clinical support, peer accountability, and relapse prevention tools built around your real life.
form_h2: Find Out If Your Alcohol Treatment Is Covered
form_body: Fill out the form and one of our admissions coordinators will verify your benefits and walk you through your alcohol treatment options. Most PPO plans cover it fully.

page_title: Dual Diagnosis Treatment Dallas TX | Tru Dallas Detox
page_description: Mental health and addiction treatment in Dallas TX. We treat co-occurring disorders with integrated clinical care. Most PPO plans accepted. Same-day admission available.
hero_paragraph: We accept most private PPO plans. If addiction and mental health are both part of your story, they both need to be treated — at the same time, under the same roof. Get a confidential 5-minute benefits check today.
insurance_h2: Integrated Mental Health & Addiction Treatment
insurance_body_p1: Treating addiction without addressing the underlying mental health condition is one of the most common reasons people relapse. Our dual diagnosis program treats both — simultaneously, with a single coordinated clinical team.
insurance_body_p2: From acute medical detox through psychiatric stabilization and residential care, every level of treatment is under one roof.
insurance_h2_2: Your PPO Plan Covers Dual Diagnosis Treatment
insurance_body_2: Most PPO plans cover the full cost of co-occurring disorder treatment. We verify your benefits in minutes and make sure you're using every dollar your plan allows — so you can focus on one thing.
process_quote: "Addiction almost never travels alone. When we treat the mental health piece alongside the substance use, outcomes change dramatically."
break_h2: One Call. We Take It From There.
break_body: From verifying your insurance to coordinating your admission and medical intake — our team has done this thousands of times. You make the decision to get help. We handle everything else.
treatment_h2: Integrated Treatment for Addiction & Mental Health — Start to Finish
treatment_card1_body: Our medically supervised detox program integrates psychiatric monitoring from day one — because withdrawal and mental health symptoms often overlap and require coordinated clinical management.
treatment_card2_body: Residential dual diagnosis treatment at Tru Dallas combines individual therapy, psychiatric care, and group support in a structured environment designed for people managing both addiction and mental health conditions.
treatment_card3_body: Long-term recovery from co-occurring disorders requires ongoing support. Our alumni program connects you to continued mental health resources, peer accountability, and clinical follow-up after discharge.
form_h2: Find Out If Your Dual Diagnosis Treatment Is Covered
form_body: Fill out the form and one of our admissions coordinators will verify your benefits and walk you through your dual diagnosis treatment options. Most PPO plans cover it fully.
